message: 🌱 Add kudo: provide a way to run a trigger a plan based on parameter mission (#678)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kudo-1147-provide-a-way-to-run-a-trigger-a-plan-based-on-parameter-value",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kudo: provide a way to run a trigger a plan based on parameter value",
+    "description": "provide a way to run a trigger a plan based on parameter value. Requested by 1+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kudo deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kudo version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kudo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kudo\nhelm list -n kudo 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kudo installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kudo configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kudo configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kudo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kudo\nkubectl get configmap -n kudo -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kudo\n```\n**What would you like to be added**:\nTrigger a plan based on the parameter value. \nRight now we can specify apply/delete tasks."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for provide a way to run a trigger a plan based on parameter",
+        "description": "This KEP provides a way for operator developers to enable and disable features in their KUDO operators.\n```yaml\ntasks:\n  - name: mirrormaker\n    kind: Apply\n    spec:\n      resources:\n        - mirror-maker-config.yaml\n        - mirror-maker.yaml\n  - name: cruise-deployment\n    kind: Apply\n    spec:\n      resources:\n        - cruise-control-config.yaml\n        - cruise-control.yaml\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kudo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kudo\nkubectl get events -n kudo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"provide a way to run a trigger a plan based on parameter\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This KEP provides a way for operator developers to enable and disable features in their KUDO operators.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "tasks:\n  - name: mirrormaker\n    kind: Apply\n    spec:\n      resources:\n        - mirror-maker-config.yaml\n        - mirror-maker.yaml\n  - name: cruise-deployment\n    kind: Apply\n    spec:\n      resources:\n        - cruise-control-config.yaml\n        - cruise-control.yaml",
+        "tasks:\n  - name: cruise-control\n    kind: FeatureInstall\n    spec:\n      value: {{ .Params.enable-cruise-control }}\n      resources:\n        - cruise-control.yaml"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kudo",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kudo"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kudobuilder/kudo/issues/1147",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kudobuilder/kudo",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kudobuilder/kudo/pull/1317"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kudo installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:34:10.297Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
